name: Tokyo Street
label: 東京
description: Bold graphics. Dark silhouettes. Oversized energy. Inspired by the streets of Shibuya and Harajuku — where anime culture and streetwear collide.

name: Cyberpunk
label: サイバー
description: Neon accents. Futuristic silhouettes. High-contrast cuts for those living in the space between human and machine. Inspired by Akira, Ghost in the Shell, and the neon-soaked future.

name: Minimal Anime
label: ミニマル
description: Clean lines. Subtle references. Every-day wearability without sacrificing anime culture. These pieces are for the fan who doesn't need to announce themselves.

name: Shibuya Casual
label: 渋谷
description: Relaxed fits. Street cool. The kind of outfit you throw on and somehow look intentional. Inspired by Shibuya crossing energy — effortlessly stylish in any universe.
